selectionRule: A candidate is eligible only when an external organisation owns the implementation and oracle, the surface addresses a documented consumer problem, and results are attributable and reproducible.

candidates.boundedSurface: Run the five manifested pic-semantics/0.1.0 valid and invalid valueState cases in a clean upstream test job without changing PolicyEngine calculation semantics.
candidates.expectedEffort: One semantics adapter plus an upstream test workflow for the five manifested cases.
candidates.independenceRisk: A maintainer-controlled fork or contributor branch is insufficient unless the implementation and oracle are independently curated and the external organisation acknowledges the result.
candidates.noResponseExit: After one authorized issue/PR follow-up and the documented response window, record unresponsive and do not count the candidate toward post-v1 maturity targets.

candidates.boundedSurface: Run the five manifested pic-semantics/0.1.0 valid and invalid valueState cases using OpenFisca's existing calculation and test conventions, preserving OpenFisca as the semantic engine.
candidates.expectedEffort: One semantics adapter and a reproducible upstream CI invocation for the five manifested cases.
candidates.independenceRisk: The RaC maintainer cannot curate the OpenFisca oracle or treat an unreviewed local fork as independent evidence.
candidates.noResponseExit: Historical authorization allowed a bounded response window, but the explicit maintainer refusal superseded it.

candidates.boundedSurface: Run the five manifested pic-semantics/0.1.0 valid and invalid valueState cases against a clean NZ package checkout without promoting any agent-generated fixture as golden evidence.
candidates.expectedEffort: One semantics adapter and a clean hosted test run for the five manifested cases.
candidates.independenceRisk: The existing local fork and reconciliation study are contributor-controlled and therefore rehearsal evidence only until BetterRules independently runs and acknowledges the result.
candidates.noResponseExit: After one authorized follow-up and the documented response window, record unresponsive and do not count the candidate toward post-v1 maturity targets.

candidates.boundedSurface: Use independently controlled code and oracle to run the five manifested pic-semantics/0.1.0 valid and invalid valueState cases and publish the v2 evidence bundle.
candidates.expectedEffort: A bounded clean-room implementation and one reproducible evidence packet.
candidates.owner: Dylan to nominate; external organisation to execute
candidates.independenceRisk: The organisation, implementation, and oracle curator must be independent of this repository and must acknowledge the result; no candidate has yet been identified.
candidates.noResponseExit: If no suitable organisation is identified after the approved outreach round, record no-selection and leave the post-v1 evidence programme open rather than substituting an internal rehearsal.

humanBoundary: PolicyEngine and OpenFisca core outreach was individually authorized and submitted. OpenFisca core declined and no follow-up is authorized. Other external communications still require separate human authorization. No outreach, response, issue comment, or candidate is counted as adoption without qualifying independently verified evidence.
sourceOfTruth: This registry supplements CANDIDATES.md; external acknowledgements and immutable result packets must be added before any candidate can satisfy the post-v1 maturity targets.
